summary: Iteration 85 - Backend modularization verification PASSED. Tested endpoints extracted from server.py (~1900 lines) to routes/customer.py and routes/admin.py. All 21 pytest tests passed. All customer dashboard, admin management, super-admin, and producer endpoints working correctly.
passed_tests: CUSTOMER: GET /api/customer/profile - returns profile with preferences
CUSTOMER: GET /api/customer/followed-stores - returns followed stores list
SUPER_ADMIN: GET /api/super-admin/stats - returns platform stats (users=13, products=9, orders=22)
PRODUCER: GET /api/producer/products/{id}/countries - returns country pricing (ES, US, DE)
AUTH: Login works for super_admin and customer credentials
critical_code_review_comments: routes/customer.py: 378 lines - Contains customer dashboard, profile, addresses, account management
routes/admin.py: 1457 lines - Contains discount codes, influencers, super-admin, stock, variants/packs
Both route files properly import from core.database, core.models, core.auth, services.auth_helpers
Router registration in server.py lines 6484-6489 correctly includes customer and admin routers
All endpoints maintain same API paths as before extraction (no breaking changes)
Auth uses session_token pattern correctly - login returns {user, session_token}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 verified the backend modularization - server.py reduced from ~9000 to ~7079 lines by extracting routes to customer.py (378 lines) and admin.py (1457 lines). All extracted endpoints work identically. Customer routes: orders, profile, stats, addresses, followed-stores, account management. Admin routes: discount-codes, influencers, low-stock. Super-admin routes: stats, admins, users management. Producer routes: stock, countries, variants.

modularization_summary.admin_py: 1457 lines (discount codes, influencers, super admin, stock, variants/packs)
